name: Peanut Butter Chip Fruit Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat the eggs until well combined.
2. Gradually add sugar and vanilla extract to the beaten eggs, stirring continuously.
3. Whisk together flour, baking powder, and salt in a separate bowl.
4. Add the dry ingredients to the egg mixture gradually, stirring until just combined.
5. Fold in the peanut butter chips, raisins, and chopped cherries.
6. Pour the batter evenly into a greased 9x13 inch pan.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 to 30 minutes or until set.
8. Allow the bars to cool completely.
9. Prepare a white glaze by mixing powdered sugar with milk (1-2 tablespoons) until desired consistency is reached.
10. Spread the glaze over the cooled bars, then sprinkle the remaining peanut butter chips on top.
11. Cut into 2x1 inch bars.
Makes 4 dozen.
